message:
feat(fnp): port arctan2 from NumPy passthrough to native Rust

- Add pub fn arctan2() to fnp-ufunc using f64::atan2
- Update fnp-python arctan2 binding to use native implementation
- Add conformance_arctan2.rs harness with 10 oracle tests covering:
  - Basic quadrant cases (all four quadrants)
  - Array operations with broadcasting
  - Special values (inf, nan, -0.0)
  - 2D broadcasting
  - 50+ random inputs via np.random.seed(42)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
